channel.title: Building on Jsonnet-as-a-Service
channel.description: Recent content in Building on Jsonnet-as-a-Service

item.title: Building and Testing
item.description:
The host needs no Go toolchain. Every build and test command runs through the development shell that flake.nix defines, with flake.lock pinning each tool to an exact version:

nix develop --command <command>

CI runs the same shell, so a gate that is green locally is green there by construction. Run nix develop on its own to drop into an interactive shell and invoke the tools bare.

The shell carries the Go toolchain, the static-analysis suite, the docs and dashboard tooling, and the envtest assets. KUBEBUILDER_ASSETS points at an etcd + kube-apiserver + kubectl bundle assembled from nixpkgs, so the envtest-backed tests run offline with nothing to download.
